title: Job Opportunity Analyzer Company Pool
description: Lightweight schema for city-level company pool samples used by the job-opportunity-analyzer skill.

schema_version.description: Schema version for compatibility checks. Bump MAJOR on breaking field changes and MINOR on additive changes.

city.description: Target city slug for this fact set, such as hangzhou or shanghai.

generated_at.description: Optional date when the sample file was assembled.

companies.description: City-level company candidates captured as CompanyProfile entries.

job_opportunities.description: Observed opportunities linked back to a company_id.

company_sentiments.description: Public sentiment notes linked back to a company_id.

SourceRef.description: Traceable source reference for a fact, observation, or inclusion reason.

source_id.description: Stable identifier within the sample file, such as src-hz-001.

source_type.description: High-level source category used by the skill to weigh evidence strength.

observed_at.description: Date when the source was checked or noted.

note.description: Optional short context about what the source supports.

CompanyProfile.description: Minimal company profile for candidate selection and follow-up analysis.

company_id.description: Stable slug-like identifier referenced by opportunities and sentiment entries.

name.description: Public company name used in reports.

city.description: Primary city slug for this company profile.

tier.description: Simple candidate tier used for prioritization in the company pool.

known_business.description: Short business or product labels that explain why the company matters for the target market.

employee_count.description: Approximate employee count when a public estimate exists; keep null when unknown.

avg_rating.description: Approximate aggregated public rating from a trusted public source; keep null when unavailable.

tags.description: Search and grouping tags, such as saas, ai, e-commerce, or local-dragon-head.

notes.description: Freeform operator note that stays short and factual.

include_reason.description: Short reason this company entered the city candidate pool.

source_refs.description: Traceable source references supporting company existence, hiring relevance, or tier placement.

last_verified.description: Last date this company profile was manually checked.

JobOpportunity.description: Observed job opportunity linked to a company profile.

opportunity_id.description: Stable identifier for this opportunity entry.

tech_stack.description: Observed or inferred technology keywords relevant to the role.

experience_required.description: Original public experience requirement text. Keep raw wording when standardization is unsafe.

salary_range.description: Original public salary text, such as 20-30K·14薪 or 面议.

job_url.description: Public job posting URL when available.

source_type.description: Primary source type for this opportunity entry.

match_reason.description: Short explanation of why this opportunity is relevant to the requested role or market.

salary_match.description: Human-readable match status instead of an over-precise score.

risk_flags.description: Compact list of warnings such as salary_unaligned or role_scope_unclear.

source_refs.description: References that support the role details or matching rationale.

CompanySentiment.description: Public sentiment summary captured from community or news sources.

sentiment_id.description: Stable identifier for this sentiment note.

community_source.description: Primary community source name when the note is discussion-driven, such as v2ex or niuke.

news_source.description: Primary news source name when the note is article-driven.

pros.description: Observed positive signals kept as short bullet-like phrases.

cons.description: Observed risks or downsides kept as short bullet-like phrases.

summary.description: Balanced short summary that distinguishes observation from final judgment.

observed_at.description: Date when this sentiment note was compiled.

source_refs.description: Underlying community or news references supporting the summary.
